title: 2PC Endless Ratchet Strap
description: From the manufacturer Hilka 84105025 Endless Ratchet Strap 2pce Product Description Our 2-piece set of 5m x 25mm endless ratchet straps, designed for secure and efficient load securing. Each strap boasts a breaking strength of 500kg, with a safe working capacity of 250kg, ensuring reliability and safety for your heavy-duty needs. Made from weather-resistant nylon webbing, these straps are built to withstand harsh environmental conditions, providing long-lasting durability and performance. Ideal for a variety of applications, from transportation to storage.
